TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Ian_Khama, title = Ian_Khama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ian_Khama} }

S.FORM: = Ian Khama = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 2 jiyax 27 ka Ian Khama ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Botswana ta sayang o kiya ka Ian Khama, pnaah hngkawas 2008 idas 4 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Seretse Khama Ian Khama = Seretse Khama Ian Khama (mntuting kngkawas 1953 idas 2 diyax 27) pa taxa Botswana Seyjicya mi mnniq heytay cyunkwan han, mnniq kngkawas 2008 dhuq kngkawas 2018ngalan Botswana Konghkwo Tu4 jn Soto, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 10 pa mnangal Soto dungan. Kndusan niya cuxal Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mntuting Chertsey, hiya u tu2 laqi Seretse Khama mi Khama hujn., kiya u dungus niya "Seretse" hangan niyi u "Mnsupu tqapah ka dxral msqapah". Ian Seretse Khama ka dmuwi hangan tama niya pthangan, malu slxanan rmngaw Ian Khama uri. Kndusan kyoiku mi Cyus Kngkawas 1977 idas 4, 24 knkawas ka Seretse Khama Ian Khama u mniq Sir Seretse Khama's ka ngalan Soto iyax cida u phyuwan Cwencyang, kngkawas 1989 cida daw wada psdhuwan ngalan Botswana Kwohwangcyu Sring (BDF), kiya u mniq kngkawas 1998 taygo, mniq iyax niyi u, Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mnangal knou bay cyuns jongyu, kiya mi mniq qmpah 20 knkawas daw (kngkawas1997) mnangal knmalu balay qnepah. Kndusan seyji Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa ngalan Botswana Kwohwangcyun Chuykwan, mniq kngkawas 1997 idas 12 diyax 16 pkla kari, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u mpniq kngkawas 1998 idas 3 diyax 31 taygo. Kngkawas 1998 idas 4 diyax 1, Huku Soto ka rmirih Masire phyuwan Soto cida, Seretse Khama Ian Khama ka ida daun phiyu burah Huku Soto. Binaw, Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mniq kcka Kwomin Yihuy u uka siwey, so kiya daw uka brahan kasi psdhuwan phiyu qpahun Huku Soto. Kngkawas 1998 idas 7 brah niya, hiya u wada knbeyhing bay mbiyax mangal Tudaya Serowe nmumal seykyo, diyax 13 daw tumal Kwomin Gikay ngalan giying, kiya mi psdhuwan phiyu Huku Soto. Qnita niya quri seyji Mniq dndulan niya Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa, phiyu niqan biyax keysacu na Cingpaw Mi Anjey Huwu Cyu , wada ngalan qmita mntna bay so Ryeynpang Tyawca Cyu Amirika ciko na Botswana. Mniq so quri keyjay pa, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u ida mbiyax balay dmkuh Botswana ptalax scuqi sntmanan dha quri btunux mtliwaq kiya mi muda quri keyjay knou kluwanan, pkrana snquri qqpahan pnwalang mi qqpahan rmiwaw. Seretse Khama Ian Khama mniq iyax ngalan Soto cida pa hmtur umaduk dapa ngucun, kiya mi dmkuh Botswana na qpahun qmlahang. Kngkawas 2018 cida u smriq rmngaw Donald Trump Soto ka dmudu uuda umowi umaduk dapa ngucun. Kiya uri pa, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u snquri so qnita niya sinew u ida balay so hmtur balay sinew cuyice ka hiya. Taygo Kngkawas 2018 idas 4 diyax 1 cida, Mokgweetsi Masisi ka psdhuwan phiyu Botswana Tu5 jn Soto, lmutuc Seretse Khama Ian Khama mttuku balay 10 knkawas ka iyax qnepah niya Soto. Seretse Khama Ian Khama tuhuy Mokgweetsi Masisi pa mnou balay pqriqu, tukubeycu niya ka smriq rmngaw Mokgweetsi Masisi ka Weycweyn cingsyang, hiti daw mlatac BDP kiya mi tumal Botswana Aykwo Cnseyng (BPF), kiya u mniq kngkawas 2019 cida Serowe na knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mangal 3 hiyi giying. Kngkawas 2018 cida, wada malix qpahun Soto daw, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u wada mntongs wa mniq US congbu niya ka Pnsliyan Qmlahang Kwoci, pnsliyan niyi pa mpplaq bay mniq Botswana uri. Jongyu mi mnangan snadu Jongyu
S.PHON: = ian kħama = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ian kħama ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan botswana ta sajaŋ o kija ka ian kħama, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = səɾətsə kħama ian kħama = səɾətsə kħama ian kħama (mntutiŋ kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **) pa taxa botswana səɟiʦja mi mnniq ħətaj ʦjunkwan ħan, mnniq kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas ****ŋalan botswana koŋħkwo tu* ɟn soto, kija u mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** pa mnaŋal soto duŋan. kndusan nija ʦuxal səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mntutiŋ ʦħəɾtsə, ħija u tu* laqi səɾətsə kħama mi kħama ħuɟn., kija u duŋus nija "səɾətsə" ħaŋan niji u "mnsupu tqapaħ ka dxɾal msqapaħ". ian səɾətsə kħama ka dmuwi ħaŋan tama nija ptħaŋan, malu slxanan ɾmŋaw ian kħama uɾi. kndusan kjoiku mi ʦjus kŋkawas **** idas *, ** knkawas ka səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u mniq siɾ səɾətsə kħama's ka ŋalan soto ijax ʦida u pħjuwan ʦwənʦjaŋ, kŋkawas **** ʦida daw wada psdħuwan ŋalan botswana kwoħwaŋʦju sɾiŋ (bd*), kija u mniq kŋkawas **** tajgo, mniq ijax niji u, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mnaŋal knou baj ʦjuns ɟoŋju, kija mi mniq qmpaħ ** knkawas daw (kŋkawas****) mnaŋal knmalu balaj qnəpaħ. kndusan səɟi səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa ŋalan botswana kwoħwaŋʦjun ʦħujkwan, mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax ** pkla kaɾi, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u mpniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** tajgo. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, ħuku soto ka ɾmiɾiħ masiɾə pħjuwan soto ʦida, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama ka ida daun pħiju buɾaħ ħuku soto. binaw, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mniq kʦka kwomin jiħuj u uka siwə, so kija daw uka bɾaħan kasi psdħuwan pħiju qpaħun ħuku soto. kŋkawas **** idas * bɾaħ nija, ħija u wada knbəħiŋ baj mbijax maŋal tudaja səɾowə nmumal səkjo, dijax ** daw tumal kwomin gikaj ŋalan gijiŋ, kija mi psdħuwan pħiju ħuku soto. qnita nija quɾi səɟi mniq dndulan nija səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa, pħiju niqan bijax kəsaʦu na ʦiŋpaw mi anɟə ħuwu ʦju , wada ŋalan qmita mntna baj so ɾjənpaŋ tjawʦa ʦju amiɾika ʦiko na botswana. mniq so quɾi kəɟaj pa, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u ida mbijax balaj dmkuħ botswana ptalax sʦuqi sntmanan dħa quɾi btunux mtliwaq kija mi muda quɾi kəɟaj knou kluwanan, pkɾana snquɾi qqpaħan pnwalaŋ mi qqpaħan ɾmiwaw. səɾətsə kħama ian kħama mniq ijax ŋalan soto ʦida pa ħmtuɾ umaduk dapa ŋuʦun, kija mi dmkuħ botswana na qpaħun qmlaħaŋ. kŋkawas **** ʦida u smɾiq ɾmŋaw donald tɾump soto ka dmudu uuda umowi umaduk dapa ŋuʦun. kija uɾi pa, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u snquɾi so qnita nija sinəw u ida balaj so ħmtuɾ balaj sinəw ʦujiʦə ka ħija. tajgo kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * ʦida, mokgwəətsi masisi ka psdħuwan pħiju botswana tu* ɟn soto, lmutuʦ səɾətsə kħama ian kħama mttuku balaj ** knkawas ka ijax qnəpaħ nija soto. səɾətsə kħama ian kħama tuħuj mokgwəətsi masisi pa mnou balaj pqɾiqu, tukubəʦu nija ka smɾiq ɾmŋaw mokgwəətsi masisi ka wəʦwən ʦiŋsjaŋ, ħiti daw mlataʦ bdp kija mi tumal botswana ajkwo ʦnsəŋ (bp*), kija u mniq kŋkawas **** ʦida səɾowə na knbəħiŋ səŋkjo ʦida wada maŋal * ħiji gijiŋ. kŋkawas **** ʦida, wada malix qpaħun soto daw, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u wada mntoŋs wa mniq us ʦoŋbu nija ka pnslijan qmlaħaŋ kwoʦi, pnslijan niji pa mpplaq baj mniq botswana uɾi. ɟoŋju mi mnaŋan snadu ɟoŋju
S.FORM: = Ian Khama = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 2 jiyax 27 ka Ian Khama ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Botswana ta sayang o kiya ka Ian Khama, pnaah hngkawas 2008 idas 4 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Seretse Khama Ian Khama = Seretse Khama Ian Khama (mntuting kngkawas 1953 idas 2 diyax 27) pa taxa Botswana Seyjicya mi mnniq heytay cyunkwan han, mnniq kngkawas 2008 dhuq kngkawas 2018ngalan Botswana Konghkwo Tu4 jn Soto, kiya u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 10 pa mnangal Soto dungan. Kndusan niya cuxal Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mntuting Chertsey, hiya u tu2 laqi Seretse Khama mi Khama hujn., kiya u dungus niya "Seretse" hangan niyi u "Mnsupu tqapah ka dxral msqapah". Ian Seretse Khama ka dmuwi hangan tama niya pthangan, malu slxanan rmngaw Ian Khama uri. Kndusan kyoiku mi Cyus Kngkawas 1977 idas 4, 24 knkawas ka Seretse Khama Ian Khama u mniq Sir Seretse Khama's ka ngalan Soto iyax cida u phyuwan Cwencyang, kngkawas 1989 cida daw wada psdhuwan ngalan Botswana Kwohwangcyu Sring (BDF), kiya u mniq kngkawas 1998 taygo, mniq iyax niyi u, Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mnangal knou bay cyuns jongyu, kiya mi mniq qmpah 20 knkawas daw (kngkawas1997) mnangal knmalu balay qnepah. Kndusan seyji Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa ngalan Botswana Kwohwangcyun Chuykwan, mniq kngkawas 1997 idas 12 diyax 16 pkla kari, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u mpniq kngkawas 1998 idas 3 diyax 31 taygo. Kngkawas 1998 idas 4 diyax 1, Huku Soto ka rmirih Masire phyuwan Soto cida, Seretse Khama Ian Khama ka ida daun phiyu burah Huku Soto. Binaw, Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa mniq kcka Kwomin Yihuy u uka siwey, so kiya daw uka brahan kasi psdhuwan phiyu qpahun Huku Soto. Kngkawas 1998 idas 7 brah niya, hiya u wada knbeyhing bay mbiyax mangal Tudaya Serowe nmumal seykyo, diyax 13 daw tumal Kwomin Gikay ngalan giying, kiya mi psdhuwan phiyu Huku Soto. Qnita niya quri seyji Mniq dndulan niya Seretse Khama Ian Khama pa, phiyu niqan biyax keysacu na Cingpaw Mi Anjey Huwu Cyu , wada ngalan qmita mntna bay so Ryeynpang Tyawca Cyu Amirika ciko na Botswana. Mniq so quri keyjay pa, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u ida mbiyax balay dmkuh Botswana ptalax scuqi sntmanan dha quri btunux mtliwaq kiya mi muda quri keyjay knou kluwanan, pkrana snquri qqpahan pnwalang mi qqpahan rmiwaw. Seretse Khama Ian Khama mniq iyax ngalan Soto cida pa hmtur umaduk dapa ngucun, kiya mi dmkuh Botswana na qpahun qmlahang. Kngkawas 2018 cida u smriq rmngaw Donald Trump Soto ka dmudu uuda umowi umaduk dapa ngucun. Kiya uri pa, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u snquri so qnita niya sinew u ida balay so hmtur balay sinew cuyice ka hiya. Taygo Kngkawas 2018 idas 4 diyax 1 cida, Mokgweetsi Masisi ka psdhuwan phiyu Botswana Tu5 jn Soto, lmutuc Seretse Khama Ian Khama mttuku balay 10 knkawas ka iyax qnepah niya Soto. Seretse Khama Ian Khama tuhuy Mokgweetsi Masisi pa mnou balay pqriqu, tukubeycu niya ka smriq rmngaw Mokgweetsi Masisi ka Weycweyn cingsyang, hiti daw mlatac BDP kiya mi tumal Botswana Aykwo Cnseyng (BPF), kiya u mniq kngkawas 2019 cida Serowe na knbeyhing seyngkyo cida wada mangal 3 hiyi giying. Kngkawas 2018 cida, wada malix qpahun Soto daw, Seretse Khama Ian Khama u wada mntongs wa mniq US congbu niya ka Pnsliyan Qmlahang Kwoci, pnsliyan niyi pa mpplaq bay mniq Botswana uri. Jongyu mi mnangan snadu Jongyu
S.PHON: = ian kħama = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ian kħama ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan botswana ta sajaŋ o kija ka ian kħama, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = səɾətsə kħama ian kħama = səɾətsə kħama ian kħama (mntutiŋ kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **) pa taxa botswana səɟiʦja mi mnniq ħətaj ʦjunkwan ħan, mnniq kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas ****ŋalan botswana koŋħkwo tu* ɟn soto, kija u mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** pa mnaŋal soto duŋan. kndusan nija ʦuxal səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mntutiŋ ʦħəɾtsə, ħija u tu* laqi səɾətsə kħama mi kħama ħuɟn., kija u duŋus nija "səɾətsə" ħaŋan niji u "mnsupu tqapaħ ka dxɾal msqapaħ". ian səɾətsə kħama ka dmuwi ħaŋan tama nija ptħaŋan, malu slxanan ɾmŋaw ian kħama uɾi. kndusan kjoiku mi ʦjus kŋkawas **** idas *, ** knkawas ka səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u mniq siɾ səɾətsə kħama's ka ŋalan soto ijax ʦida u pħjuwan ʦwənʦjaŋ, kŋkawas **** ʦida daw wada psdħuwan ŋalan botswana kwoħwaŋʦju sɾiŋ (bd*), kija u mniq kŋkawas **** tajgo, mniq ijax niji u, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mnaŋal knou baj ʦjuns ɟoŋju, kija mi mniq qmpaħ ** knkawas daw (kŋkawas****) mnaŋal knmalu balaj qnəpaħ. kndusan səɟi səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa ŋalan botswana kwoħwaŋʦjun ʦħujkwan, mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax ** pkla kaɾi, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u mpniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** tajgo. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, ħuku soto ka ɾmiɾiħ masiɾə pħjuwan soto ʦida, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama ka ida daun pħiju buɾaħ ħuku soto. binaw, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa mniq kʦka kwomin jiħuj u uka siwə, so kija daw uka bɾaħan kasi psdħuwan pħiju qpaħun ħuku soto. kŋkawas **** idas * bɾaħ nija, ħija u wada knbəħiŋ baj mbijax maŋal tudaja səɾowə nmumal səkjo, dijax ** daw tumal kwomin gikaj ŋalan gijiŋ, kija mi psdħuwan pħiju ħuku soto. qnita nija quɾi səɟi mniq dndulan nija səɾətsə kħama ian kħama pa, pħiju niqan bijax kəsaʦu na ʦiŋpaw mi anɟə ħuwu ʦju , wada ŋalan qmita mntna baj so ɾjənpaŋ tjawʦa ʦju amiɾika ʦiko na botswana. mniq so quɾi kəɟaj pa, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u ida mbijax balaj dmkuħ botswana ptalax sʦuqi sntmanan dħa quɾi btunux mtliwaq kija mi muda quɾi kəɟaj knou kluwanan, pkɾana snquɾi qqpaħan pnwalaŋ mi qqpaħan ɾmiwaw. səɾətsə kħama ian kħama mniq ijax ŋalan soto ʦida pa ħmtuɾ umaduk dapa ŋuʦun, kija mi dmkuħ botswana na qpaħun qmlaħaŋ. kŋkawas **** ʦida u smɾiq ɾmŋaw donald tɾump soto ka dmudu uuda umowi umaduk dapa ŋuʦun. kija uɾi pa, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u snquɾi so qnita nija sinəw u ida balaj so ħmtuɾ balaj sinəw ʦujiʦə ka ħija. tajgo kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * ʦida, mokgwəətsi masisi ka psdħuwan pħiju botswana tu* ɟn soto, lmutuʦ səɾətsə kħama ian kħama mttuku balaj ** knkawas ka ijax qnəpaħ nija soto. səɾətsə kħama ian kħama tuħuj mokgwəətsi masisi pa mnou balaj pqɾiqu, tukubəʦu nija ka smɾiq ɾmŋaw mokgwəətsi masisi ka wəʦwən ʦiŋsjaŋ, ħiti daw mlataʦ bdp kija mi tumal botswana ajkwo ʦnsəŋ (bp*), kija u mniq kŋkawas **** ʦida səɾowə na knbəħiŋ səŋkjo ʦida wada maŋal * ħiji gijiŋ. kŋkawas **** ʦida, wada malix qpaħun soto daw, səɾətsə kħama ian kħama u wada mntoŋs wa mniq us ʦoŋbu nija ka pnslijan qmlaħaŋ kwoʦi, pnslijan niji pa mpplaq baj mniq botswana uɾi. ɟoŋju mi mnaŋan snadu ɟoŋju
